moments.title: Golf's Open Championship tees off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with top players competing for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The oldest major in golf is back! The Open Championship starts tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Event start
angles.copy: Four days of world-class golf begin as The Open Championship gets underway. Expect drama, precision, and maybe a few surprises on the greens.

moments.title: Latitude Festival celebrates 20 years
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Local excitement
angles.copy: Suffolk's Henham Park is gearing up for Latitude Festival's 20th anniversary next week! David Byrne, Teddy Swims & Lewis Capaldi lead the lineup.

angles.name: Beyond music
angles.copy: Beyond the headliners, Latitude always delivers comedy, theatre and arts. Who's excited for a full weekend of culture in Suffolk?

moments.title: Queen legend Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Sir Brian May, the iconic guitarist and co-founder of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar hero tribute
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Sir Brian May this Friday! What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Astrophysicist & rock star
angles.copy: From astrophysics to stadium rock, Brian May is a true icon. Wishing the Queen guitarist a fantastic 79th birthday this weekend!

moments.title: Guitar icon Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Mexican-American guitar virtuoso Carlos Santana, known for pioneering Latin rock fusion, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Latin rock legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana this Monday! What's the first track that comes to mind when you hear his name?

angles.name: Signature sound
angles.copy: His guitar playing is instantly recognisable. Celebrate Carlos Santana's 79th birthday with us and tell us your favourite Santana track!

moments.title: Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary lead singer of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock icon celebration
angles.copy: Still rolling at 83! Happy Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger next week. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Unforgettable performances
angles.copy: From Dartford to global superstar – Mick Jagger is 83 on July 26th! What a career. What's his most unforgettable performance for you?

moments.title: Singer-songwriter Pete Yorn turns 52
moments.blurb: American alternative rock singer-songwriter Pete Yorn, known for hits like 'Life on a Chain,' celebrates his 52nd birthday on July 27th.

angles.name: Indie rock favourite
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the brilliant Pete Yorn next week! What's your go-to track from his incredible discography?

angles.name: Album appreciation
angles.copy: Celebrating Pete Yorn's 52nd on July 27th! An indie rock favourite with a string of great albums. Which one is your top pick?

moments.title: Summer holidays kick off across the UK
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK begin to break up for the long-awaited summer holidays this week, marking the start of a busy period for families.

angles.name: Holiday start excitement
angles.copy: The great escape begins! School's out for summer across much of the UK this week. What are your plans?

angles.name: Family plans
angles.copy: Goodbye school runs, hello summer holidays! Wishing everyone breaking up this week a fantastic and well-deserved break.
